home.aboutText: The Chip and Dale team consists of enthusiasts and professional guides who love the untouched nature of Kyrgyzstan. We do not just organize trips, we open hidden gems of the Tien Shan mountains that ordinary tourists rarely reach.

author.title: 🏔 Custom tours
author.text: We create unique routes from mountain passes to secluded lakes.

expedition.title: 🏕 Expeditions
expedition.text: For those who want to explore wild nature deeper. We organize logistics, equipment and camping.

guide.title: 🚙 Support
guide.text: We provide safety and comfort throughout the journey.

home.aboutDesc: We believe mountains are a place of power. Our mission is to show you the real wild Kyrgyzstan and create memories that last a lifetime.

mountain.title: 🏔 Mountain tours
mountain.text: Travel through the most beautiful places of the country.

horse.title: 🐎 Horse riding
horse.text: Horse routes through mountains and valleys.

yurt.title: ⛺ Yurts and ethno tourism
yurt.text: Living in yurts and discovering nomadic culture.

home.heroText: Mountains, lakes, fishing, hunting, moto tours and real adventures.
